old: We should love and protect the public environment.
new: We should take care of the public environment.
reason: 爱护 means to cherish and look after, not literally 'love and protect' — that phrasing is an unnatural calque in English.

old: Please love and protect the animals here.
new: Please take care of the animals here.
reason: 爱护 should be rendered as 'take care of', not 'love and protect'.

old: Our parents taught us to love and protect our books.
new: Our parents taught us to take care of our books.
reason: 爱护 should be rendered as 'take care of', not 'love and protect'.

old: 这个地区很安全，大家都感到安。
new: 他出门在外，父母感到不安。
reason: 感到安 with standalone 安 as a predicate is unnatural; 安 in the sense of 'safe/at ease' only functions standalone in fixed phrases like 不安. Replacing with a natural use of 安 (不安).

old: This area is very safe; everyone feels secure.
new: While he was away from home, his parents felt uneasy.
reason: Translation updated to match corrected sentence.

old: He made good use of the time.
reason: 把握住了时间 means 'seized/grasped the time'; 'made good use of the time' is a loose paraphrase that obscures the meaning of 把握.

old: 这顿饭包含早餐和晚餐。
new: 这个套餐包含早餐和晚餐。
reason: 这顿饭 (this meal) cannot logically include both breakfast and dinner simultaneously. Changed to 套餐 (set meal/package) which can naturally include multiple meals.

old: This meal includes breakfast and dinner.
new: This meal package includes breakfast and dinner.
reason: Translation updated to match corrected sentence.
保 alone as a free verb meaning 'protect' is unnatural; 保 in this sense is a bound morpheme that functions only in compounds like 保护, 保安, etc.

new: We must protect the environment well.
reason: Translation updated to match corrected sentence.
饼 refers to flat round baked or pan-cooked food items (月饼, 烧饼, etc.), not the layered sponge cake that English 'cake' implies (蛋糕). The definition should reflect the flat, round nature of 饼.
